notes:
Call Stability + Grid Refresh

  • No false missed nudges: Ending a normal 1to1 call no longer creates an incorrect missed-call nudge.
  • Resilient listeners: Lobby and CallView now auto-recover user listeners after temporary auth permission flickers.
  • Stable Grid tiles: Without screenshare, participant tiles stay stable (no active-speaker jumping).
  • Screenshare layout: Shared content is now dominant with a fixed right participant strip and overflow counter.
  • Camera-off visuals: In Grid mode, camera-off tiles now use modern, low-cost theme backgrounds derived from profile images, with adaptive effect reduction for smoother performance.
  • Active app badge restored: The app indicator is visible again directly inside call bubbles and grid tiles.
